name: chain_recruit_new_affiliates_via_cold_email_ou
method: recruit new affiliates via cold email outreach

stages.task: Scrape Reddit r/Affiliatemarketing, r/juststart, Twitter affiliate hashtags for people actively promoting products in our niches (productivity, religious apps, AI tools). Extract name, email/DM handle, audience size, current products promoted.
Score prospects by: audience size (>500 followers), engagement rate (>2%), niche relevance to our products, existing affiliate activity. Filter to top 20 per week.

Generate personalized cold email using procedural memory cold email framework: mention their specific content, offer 30-50% commission on our digital products, one clear CTA. Send via custom SMTP script.
Track replies, signups, and revenue per affiliate. Feed results back to qualifier to improve scoring.
